name: parkinson_plan_tool
description: Enhanced RAG medication planning for Parkinson's disease patients. Extracts focus keywords from SOAP notes, retrieves similar patients via FAISS, performs per-focus tendency analysis, generates an initial prescription, and refines it with a Delta Verifier anchored on active medication history.

help.summary: Enhanced RAG prescription generation for Parkinson's disease (SOAP-based, non-MIMIC).

options.name: subjective
options.description: Subjective section of the SOAP note

options.name: objective
options.description: Objective section of the SOAP note

options.name: assessment
options.description: Assessment section of the SOAP note

options.name: recent_visit_history
options.description: List of recent visit dicts with prescription field

options.name: patient_id
options.description: Patient identifier (used to exclude self from RAG)

options.name: retrieve_patients
options.description: Number of similar patients per focus query (default 7)
